creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Sun Aug  5 05:03:39 2012
New Revision: 302056
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302056

Log:
  - Update to 0.5.1
  
  PR:		170148
  Submitted by:	Ports Fury

Modified:
  head/games/cavezofphear/Makefile
  head/games/cavezofphear/distinfo

Modified: head/games/cavezofphear/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/cavezofphear/Makefile	Sun Aug  5 05:03:38 2012	(r302055)
+++ head/games/cavezofphear/Makefile	Sun Aug  5 05:03:39 2012	(r302056)
@@ -6,35 +6,40 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	cavezofphear
-PORTVERSION=	0.5
+PORTVERSION=	0.5.1
 CATEGORIES=	games
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.x86.no/cavezofphear/ \
-		http://mirror.amdmi3.ru/distfiles/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.x86.no/cavezofphear/
 DISTNAME=	phear-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Boulder Dash / Digger-like game written using ncurses
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv3 # (or later)
+
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
+
+BUILD_WRKSRC=	${WRKDIR}/${DISTNAME}/src
+
 USE_BZIP2=	yes
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
 MAKE_ARGS=	CC="${CC}" CFLAGS="${CFLAGS}"
-BUILD_WRKSRC=	${WRKDIR}/${DISTNAME}/src
-MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=	yes
+ALL_TARGET=	phear
+MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
 
 PORTDOCS=	ChangeLog README README-EDITOR TODO
 
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|\./data|${DATADIR}/data|' ${WRKSRC}/src/chk.c
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|\./phear|phear|' ${WRKSRC}/README-EDITOR
 
 do-install:
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${BUILD_WRKSRC}/phear ${PREFIX}/bin
 	${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/phear ${PREFIX}/bin
 	@(cd ${WRKSRC}; ${COPYTREE_SHARE} data ${DATADIR})
-
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
-post-install:
-	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
+	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
 .for f in ${PORTDOCS}
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${f} ${DOCSDIR}
 .endfor

Modified: head/games/cavezofphear/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/games/cavezofphear/distinfo	Sun Aug  5 05:03:38 2012	(r302055)
+++ head/games/cavezofphear/distinfo	Sun Aug  5 05:03:39 2012	(r302056)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (phear-0.5.tar.bz2) = 1087c04347ff60d153ffceb91363a31643337ed71b4a40b68160392d32d68bb7
-SIZE (phear-0.5.tar.bz2) = 20502
+SHA256 (phear-0.5.1.tar.bz2) = 9af83c2246dc05531e3d1d11ea931fe38e7086b513fb8e295c7e95b54c68e687
+SIZE (phear-0.5.1.tar.bz2) = 25750
